raw_consumer_statement: I was charged thousands of dollars on my card by XXXX. I did not make the charges, nor do I know the companies, people, or the products or services. I reported this to Citi on several occasions, to XXXX, and to the FBI. XXXX has been totally uncooperative as has Citi. They continue to bill me for the fraudulent amounts and continue to add interest and late fees. I paid the card in full in XX/XX/year> for the charges I personally made. However, they will not acknowledge that and continue to send me statements with the disputed charges without providing any proof that the charges are mine. It is affecting my credit rating.
